speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe bas pathar bankar kaam dhoondte rehna hai
text: Mujhe bas pathar bankar kaam dhoondte rehna hai. Aaj subah termination email dekha toh laga sab khatam ho gaya, par bacchon ke samne rone ka waqt nahi hai kyunki agle mahine ki home loan EMI ka intezam karna hi hoga. Samaj pehle hi mujhe divorced hone ki wajah se buri nazar se dekhta hai, agar EMI bounce hui toh 'log kya kahenge' ye soch kar darr lagta hai. Mere liye breakdown ek luxury hai jo main afford nahi kar sakti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the primary duty-based frame of protecting children and securing the EMI.
text: Tumhara pura dhyan is waqt sirf is baat par hai ki bacchon ko is badlav ki bhak na lage aur kisi bhi tarah EMI ka safal intezam ho jaye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main bacchon ke saamne weak nahi pad sakti. Unki school fees aur ye badi si EMI... main fail hona afford nahi kar sakti kisi bhi keemat par.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Softly name the implied fear of societal judgment and failing as a mother.
text: Ek akeli maa hone ke naate, samaj ki nazron mein fail hone ka aur bacchon ki chhat chhin jane ka darr andar hi andar kaafi dara raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe bas pathar bankar kaam dhoondte rehna hai
text: Bilkul. Divorced auraton ko toh waise hi log judge karte hain, fail hone ka toh chance hi nahi hai. Ab job chhut gayi toh kahenge iski hi galti hogi. Isliye mujhe bas pathar bankar kaam dhoondte rehna hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Respond to the stigma cue with a soft, validating restatement ending in a pause.
text: Samaj ke in tano ka darr tumhe apni sachai kisi se bhi share karne se rok raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Kaun sunega meri? Sabko lagta hai main bahut strong aur independent maa hoon. Subah se 50 HRs ko message kar chuki hoon LinkedIn par, par kisi ka reply nahi aaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Explore the internal toll of presenting a strong facade while managing heavy responsibilities.
text: Bacchon ki fees aur EMI ka itna bada bojh akele uthate uthate, aur duniya ke aage 'strong' banne ka dikhawa karte hue, tumhari apni himmat aur energy kis mukam par hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Himmat toh poori tarah nichod chuki hai. Aisa lagta hai jaise kandhon par hazar kilo ka wazan rakha hai. Bas mechanically chal rahi hoon kyunki dono bacche poori tarah mujh par dependent hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the prolonged duration and heavy burden carried alone.
text: Pata nahi kitne lambe samay se tum akele hi is pure ghar ka bhaar aur samaj ke tano ki fikar dho rahi ho bina ruke.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe bas pathar bankar kaam dhoondte rehna hai
text: Teen saal ho gaye jabse akele hoon. Koi ek din aisa nahi gaya jab maine bina stress ke saans li ho. Aur ab ye termination. Mujhe bas pathar bankar kaam dhoondte rehna hai, varna sab barbad ho jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the deep, unexpressed exhaustion of single-handedly maintaining the family's survival.
text: Lagta hai in teen saalo ke akele safar aur achanak aaye is termination ke dabaav mein, tum ek aisi gahri EXHAUSTION mehsoos kar rahi ho jise koi dekh nahi paata.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul... wahi thakan hai. Itni EXHAUSTION hoti hai ki raat ko aankh lagte hi subah ho jati hai, aur phir wahi race shuru. Par bacchon ko dekhti hoon toh rukne ki himmat nahi hoti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her exhaustion as culturally expected given her massive responsibilities, separating her worth from the job outcome.
text: Bina kisi support ke akele metro mein EMI aur bacchon ki poori zimmedari uthane wali maa ke liye aisi thakan mehsus karna bilkul normal hai; par yaad rakhna ki ek termination email tumhari mehnat aur ek achhi maa hone ki kabiliyat ko kam nahi kar sakta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shukriya, par society toh result dekhti hai. Agar bank wale recovery ke liye aaye, toh meri family hi sabse pehle mere upar ungli uthayegi aur poori biradari mein tamasha banega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Handle stigma cue with a soft, shorter restatement focusing on the fear of public shaming.
text: Biradari mein us tamashe aur ungli uthne ka darr tumhe aur bhi jyada akela kar deta hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohot akela. Main kisi bhi rishtedar se financial help nahi maang sakti, unhe toh bas ek aur mauka mil jayega meri azaadi aur single status ko blame karne ka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a systemic anecdote normalizing the protective secrecy of single mothers.
text: Single mothers mein akele sab kuch sehne aur kisi se madad na maangne ka pattern bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi khul ke bolega nahi kyunki samaj support dene ki jagah taane maarne ke mauke jyada dhundta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Isliye unse ummeed rakhna hi bekar hai. Par ab is emergency me karoon kya? Agle mahine EMI aur school fees dono deni hai aur market ki haalat bohot thandi chal rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer small, actionable financial assessment tasks that fit her duty without overwhelming her.
text: Is bhari dabaav mein 2 chhote kadam le sakte hain jo tumhari zimmedariyon mein rukawat na bane: ya toh apne FNF aur savings ka exact total ek jagah likh lo, ya phir agle 3 mahine ke essential kharcho ka ek bare-bones budget bana lo.

speaker: Seeker
text: Dimaag toh sunn ho rakha hai mera, numbers dekh kar aur rona na aa jaye. Par bare-bones budget banana shayad theek rahega. Kam se kam pata chalega real time picture kya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Guide her step-by-step through the budget creation task.
text: Pehle ek kagaz aur pen lo... phir usme sirf essential kharche jaise EMI, bacchon ki school fees aur ration ka total amount likho... bas itna hi calculation karna hai aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ek minute leti hoon... Okay, likh liya maine. Agar baki extra kharche rok doon, toh mere emergency fund aur savings milakar kariban dhai mahine tak ghar bina kisi rukawat ke chal jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the initial panic as a structural response, reframing the paper exercise as regaining control.
text: Aksar achanak job loss hone par hamara dimaag automatically sabse worst-case scenario banata hai, par in actual numbers ko paper par dekhne se financial dabaav thoda handleable lagne lagta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe hain. Subah toh mujhe lag raha tha main kal hi poori tarah bankrupt ho jaungi. Par 2.5 months dekh kar thodi saans aayi hai. Par uske baad kya?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the mixed feeling of temporary relief coupled with future uncertainty.
text: Dhai mahine ka backup dekh kar abhi saans mein saans aayi hai, bhale hi aage ke raaste ka dhundhlapan abhi thoda darr paida kar raha ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe bas pathar bankar kaam dhoondte rehna hai
text: Dhundhlapan toh hai, par ab panic wali halat nahi hai. Mujhe bas pathar bankar kaam dhoondte rehna hai, dhai mahine mein kuch na kuch toh mil hi jayega bacchon ki kismat se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Help her break down the job hunt into a manageable next step without risking burnout.
text: In dhai mahino ka sahi aur bina khud ko over-exhaust kiye istemaal karne ke liye, kal subah ke liye kya ek chhota aur realistic task set kar sakti ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Kal subah main fresh mind se apna CV modify karungi aur sirf 5 naye contacts ko reach out karungi. Baki time bacchon ke homework mein dhyan dungi taaki unhe kuch ajeeb na lage.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her practical approach to balancing the job hunt with maternal duties.
text: Sirf paanch jagah apply karne aur bacchon ke homework par focus karne ka decision yeh dikhata hai ki tum maa ki zimmedari aur job hunt dono ko kitni practicality se balance kar rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye balance hi meri sabse badi strength hai. Par ek baat sochi thi... agar ye dhai mahine mein kuch nahi hua, toh kya PF nikalna theek rahega emergency backup ke liye?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her internal conflict and sense of responsibility regarding the children's future funds.
text: PF ko haath lagane ka khayal aate hi tumhe aisa lag raha hai jaise tum unki aane wali suraksha ke sath samjhauta kar rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bilkul yahi feeling aati hai. Wo paise maine unki college education ke liye jode the. Unhe haath lagana mujhe bohot guilty mehsus karwata hai, par survival bhi zaruri hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframe using emergency funds as a protective strategy for the present, reducing guilt.
text: Aisi situations mein savings ya PF ko temporary survival buffer ki tarah istemal karna koi nakami nahi, balki bacchon ke aaj ko surakshit rakhne ka ek zaroori aur practical kadam hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye sunkar guilt kafi kam hua. Agar backup hai toh use karna hi samjhdari hai, na ki biradari ke dar se chup baithe rehna.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask her how she plans to wind down now that the path is clearer, encouraging momentary rest.
text: Ab jab wo PF wala backup plan aur aage ka thoda raasta clear ho gaya hai, toh aaj raat is lambi thakan ko kam karne ke liye tumhara kya plan hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Aaj main bacchon ke sath milkar dinner karungi aur laptop bilkul nahi kholungi. Subah jaldi uth kar fresh mind se apna schedule start karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how taking rest has now been integrated into her responsible routine.
text: Aaj ke is lambe aur thaka dene wale din ke baad, aakhirkar tumne apni energy ko wapas lane ke liye aaram ko apni list mein shamil kar hi liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe bas pathar bankar kaam dhoondte rehna hai
text: Ji, aaram bhi zaroori hai aage badhne ke liye. Mujhe bas pathar bankar kaam dhoondte rehna hai ye soch kar main apni hi saans rok rahi thi. Aap se baat kar ke sach mein saans aayi hai. Thank you.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a warm closing affirmation of her strength and clarity for the road ahead.
text: Tumhari is majbooti aur practicality ko wapas aate dekh kar dil se khushi hui; aane wale safar mein apni is clear soch aur bacchon ke prati lagan par humesha bharosa rakhna.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Ye structural endurance hi meri pehchaan hai
text: Ye structural endurance hi meri pehchaan hai. Naukri chali gayi par main bimar hone ka bahana bhi nahi kar sakti kyunki bacchon ki school fees aur scooty ki kist sar par hai. Chit fund mein meri thodi bahut savings wiped ho chuki hain, isliye ab thakan mein bhi mujhe double shift dhoondni hogi taaki community exclusion se bach sakun. Main thak sakti hoon par ruk nahi sakti kyunki main hi apne bacchon ka aakhri sahara hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the Seeker's duty-bound role as the last hope for her children overriding her physical limits.
text: Apne bacchon ka aakhri sahara hone ki wajah se, aapne apni thakan aur bimar hone ke haq ko bhi side mein rakh diya hai, taaki unki fees aur kist bina kisi rukaawat ke bhari ja sake.

speaker: Seeker
text: Rukaawat aayi toh sab khatam ho jayega na. Bacchon ko society mein izzat se bada karna hai. Chit fund wale paise doob gaye, ab ek double shift hi rasta bachi hai warna community wale baatein banayenge ki single mother apne bacchon ko sambhal nahi payi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the implied fear of societal judgment and failure as a single mother.
text: Ye darr aapko lagatar jagaye rakhta hai ki agar aap ruke, toh society aapke bacchon ko aur aapki mehnat ko galat nazar se dekhegi aur unhe exclude kar degi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Ye structural endurance hi meri pehchaan hai
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Yehi community exclusion ka darr mujhe sone nahi deta. Ye structural endurance hi meri pehchaan hai, isliye din raat job portals scroll karti hoon. Par ab body jawab de rahi hai, peeth mein hamesha dard rehta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask an open-ended question about how she manages the physical toll while maintaining her duty.
text: Din raat bacchon ki khatir job portals par waqt bitate hue, jab ye peeth ka dard aur badh jata hai, tab aap khud ko kaise sambhalti hain?

speaker: Seeker
text: Sambhalna padta hai. Painkiller kha leti hoon aur kaam pe lag jati hoon. Mere paas thakne ka luxury nahi hai. Scooty ki kist next week due hai, aur agar default hui toh gaadi uth jayegi, bacchon ko school kaise bhejungi?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the pressing timeline that forces her to push through pain.
text: Agle hafte ki us due date ne aapko is kadar daba diya hai ki aap dard mein bhi bina ruke bas aage ke intezaam ke baare mein hi soch rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, kyunki agar as-pados mein pata chala ki mere paas paise nahi hain, toh log taras khayenge ya judge karenge. Single aurat ko wese hi kamzor samajhte hain, main unhe mauka nahi de sakti. Isliye chup chap akele ye sab jhel rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the stigma and relational isolation softly, holding the space.
text: Logon ki nazron aur unke taras se apne parivaar ko bachane ke liye, aapne is poore bojh ko chup-chap apne akele ke kandhon par utha rakha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Ye structural endurance hi meri pehchaan hai
text: Kandhe ab sach mein thak gaye hain. Ye structural endurance hi meri pehchaan hai bol bol ke maine khud ko robot bana liya hai. Savings wiped hone ke baad se lagta hai jaise bacchon ka future mere haathon se phisal raha hai. Main andar se poori tarah toot chuki hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Name the deep exhaustion that comes from the C5 stressor masked by Duty-Based coping.
text: Lagta hai ki bacchon ke future ko har keemat par secure karne ki is zid ne aur savings chale jane ke jhatke ne, aapko andar se poori tarah nichod kar exhaust kar diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exhaustion hi toh hai. Raat-raat bhar jaag kar main hisaab lagati hoon. Par bacchon ke chehre dekhti hoon toh lagta hai inko ek better life deni hi hogi, chahe meri jaan kyun na nikal jaye. Main ek acchi maa banne mein fail nahi ho sakti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her exhaustion as normal given the job loss and chit fund loss, and separate her worth as a mother from her financial situation.
text: Achanak job chhut jana aur chit fund mein mehnat ki savings doob jana kisi ko bhi is tarah thaka aur dara sakta hai, pareshan hona bilkul natural hai; lekin aapki ek achhi maa hone ki qabiliyat is waqt ke bank balance se tay nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kaash duniya bhi aise hi sochti. Par real life mein bina paison ke koi respect nahi hai. Mujhe kisi bhi tarah double shift karni hi padegi, warna ghar kaise chalega? Par dimaag kaam hi nahi kar raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a brief systemic anecdote about how working single mothers often face this intense pressure to hide their struggle.
text: Working mothers ke groups mein akele ghar chalane ka aisa intense pressure bahut common hai—sirf aapke saath nahi ho raha, lekin aam taur par koi khul kar bolega nahi kyunki sab par ek strong independent aurat dikhne ka bada bojh hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapne mere dil ki baat keh di. Hamesha strong dikhna padta hai, aur yehi cheez mujhe kha rahi hai. Main waqai theek hona chahti hoon taaki ek clear dimaag se aage ka soch sakun. Kuch samajh nahi aa raha aage ka, ab kya karoon main?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide two small actionable steps fitting her persona and role.
text: Aise band dimaag ke saath jab itna akele mehsoos ho, toh hum do chhote kadam le sakte hain. Pehla, abhi 10 minute ke liye job portals band karke bacchon ke paas aaram se baithna, ya dusra, scooty ki kist ke liye bank helpline par minimum due check karna. Aaj ke liye kya thoda theek lag raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Bank ko call karna abhi himmat ka kaam nahi lag raha, ghabrahat badh jayegi. Main 10 minute bacchon ke paas jaakar baith sakti hoon. Waise bhi unko dhang se time diye hue bahut din ho gaye hain is tension mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Guide her step-by-step to implement the chosen action.
text: Pehle aap apne phone aur laptop ko dusre kamre mein silent par rakh dijiye... phir aaram se bacchon ke paas baith kar unhe sirf sote hue dekhiye... bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Ye structural endurance hi meri pehchaan hai
text: Phone side rakh diya hai maine. Unhe sote hue dekh kar thodi shanti toh milti hai, par agle mahine ka darr fir bhi peeche ghoomta rehta hai. Ye structural endurance hi meri pehchaan hai shayad zindagi bhar ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how stepping away brings peace but the looming duty keeps interrupting.
text: Bacchon ko sote hue dekh kar jo thoda sukoon aapko milta hai, use bhi aane wale kal ki bhari zimmedariyan poori tarah se mehsoos nahi hone deti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, par abhi sirf 10 minute unke paas baithne se ajeeb si himmat aa rahi hai. Soch rahi hoon ki ek school teacher dost hai meri, usse subah baat karke dekhti hoon agar koi part-time tuition mil jaye bacchon ko padhane jaisa.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask how generating this alternative option affects her mental load.
text: Apni us dost se is part-time kaam ke baare mein baat karne ka yeh khayal, aapke dimaag ke us bhari bojh ko abhi kaisa mehsoos karwa raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Thoda halka lag raha hai. At least ek concrete step toh hai double shift ke baare mein panic karne se better. Ghar se tutions lungi toh bacchon par dhyan bhi rahega aur exclusion ka tension thoda kam hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize reaching out to a personal network as a smart systemic survival strategy.
text: Bahut baar achanak aayi is tarah ki economic instability ke baad, apne hi network mein doston ka chhota support dhoondhna ek practical survival strategy hoti hai, isme koi stigma ki baat nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh baat sach hai. Hum akele sab kuch handle nahi kar sakte hamesha. Main bewajah poori society ka pressure le rahi thi, jabki mere paas 2-3 genuine dost hain jo bina judge kiye help kar sakte hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the shift from fearing societal exclusion to trusting close relationships.
text: Society ke us bade aur dikhawe wale darr ko chhod kar, ab aap apne un 2-3 sachche doston par bharosa karne ki himmat juta rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bharosa toh karna hi padega na. Main akeli jaan kitna jalungi? Scooty ki kist ke liye main thodi choti savings nikal lungi aur baaki us dost se tution ke regarding subah confirm kar lungi. Raasta nikal aayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how the feared consequence of a complete collapse is transforming into clear pathways.
text: Jo raste abhi tak bilkul band aur daraavne lag rahe the, wahan ab aapko chote chote backup options saaf nazar aane lage hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, option hote hain bas hum darr mein dekh nahi paate. Main poori tarah exhaust ho gayi thi isi structural endurance ki aadat mein. Par theek hai, ab thoda clear lag raha hai sab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask how gaining this clarity changes her physical sensation of exhaustion.
text: Thakaan aur is exhaustion ko thoda door karke jab aap yeh naye aur clear options dekh pa rahi hain, tab aapke kandhon ka dard ab kaisa lag raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Dard toh abhi bhi hai, par wo tension wala khichav thoda kam ho gaya hai. Abhi bacchon ke paas hi thodi der let jaungi. Pata hai, main actually thak sakti hoon, aur ye allowed hai mujhe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect her shift away from the rigid role into allowing herself basic human needs.
text: Ek aakhri sahara hone ki majboori se thoda aage badhkar, pehli baar aapne khud ko thakne ki aur aaram karne ki permission di hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Den deni hi padegi. Agar main bimar pad gayi toh asli nuksaan bacchon ka hi hoga. Isliye aaj raat ko aur job portals nahi dekhungi. Kal subah fresh uth kar dost se baat karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect how claiming time to rest is actually a protective measure for her tomorrow.
text: Aaj raat ki is neend ko chun kar, aapne aane wale kal ki subah ke liye ek behtar aur taja shuruwat ki tayyari kar li hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shuruwat karni hai. Zindagi mein ups and downs aate hain, aur main ye phase bhi nikal lungi, akele nahi toh doston ki help le kar hi sahi. Bacchon ke liye main ek naya rasta banaungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm her courage in seeking help and moving forward resiliently for her children.
text: Zindagi ki is musibat ko akele jhelne ki jagah madad lene ka ye faisla aapki us sachhi himmat ko dikhata hai, jo aage chal kar aapke bacchon ke liye ek bahut badi misaal banegi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shukriya aapka sunne ke liye. Aksar mujhe lagta tha meri baatein kisi ko samajh nahi aayengi, par bolkar ab sach mein bojh halka hua hai. Main ab dhyan rakhungi apna thoda.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Close by reflecting the positive relational impact of sharing her burden.
text: Bina kisi hichkichahat ke apna yeh saara dabaav aaj yahan baant kar, aapne khud ka khayal rakhne ki taraf ek pyara aur zaroori kadam badhaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe pathar ban kar khade rehna hoga
text: Termination letter milte hi laga jaise saans ruk gayi, par mere peeche koi backup nahi hai, bas mera kartavya hai. Papa ne kisan hokar karz lekar meri shaadi ki thi jo toot gayi, ab main un par aur bojh nahi banna chahti isliye remittance band nahi kar sakti. Sharir jawab de raha hai par ek maa hone ke naate mujhe pathar ban kar khade rehna hoga taaki ghar ka chula chalta rahe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored her role and duty statement instead of focusing purely on the distress (Lens B).
text: Achanak se naukri jane ke baawajood, tumhara poora dhyan sirf is baat par hai ki ek kisan papa ki beti aur maa hone ki apni zimmedariyan kaise bhi poori ki jayein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Zimmedari hi toh meri sachayi hai. Papa ne meri toot chuki shadi ke liye khet girvi rakh diya tha. Ab gaon mein waise hi baatein banti hain ki divorced ladki wapis aayegi, main unhe is sab ke beech aur zaleel nahi karwa sakti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Responded to the stigma cue with a gentle, shorter restatement ending in a soft pause (Lens C).
text: Apne papa ka pehle se uthaya hua karz aur gaon walo ki taano ke dar se, tum unhe apni is nayi pareshani ke baare mein nahi bata pa rahi ho...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe pathar ban kar khade rehna hoga
text: Bilkul nahi bata sakti. Har mahine paise bhej kar lagta tha ki kuch toh unka bojh kam kar rahi hoon. Andar se main darr se kaanp rahi hoon par apne bache aur unke liye mujhe pathar ban kar khade rehna hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the deep, unsaid fear of what happens to her family if she fails (Lens E).
text: Andar hi andar yeh darr sata raha hai ki agar tumne apna ye himmat wala roop chhoda, toh bache ka future aur gaon me papa, dono bikhar jayenge.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, wahi toh main darr hai. Ek single mother ke liye society me pehle hi jagah nahi hoti. Agar main kamzor pad gayi toh mera ghar rent se nikal jayega aur bacche ko dekh kar mera damm ghut raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Explored the toll this relentless burden is taking on her now that restatements have mapped her environment.
text: Jab akelepan me bache ki poori duniya khud ke kandhon par uthati ho aur chup rehna padta ho, toh us lagatar chalte rehne ki thakan kahan jati hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Thakan ka toh koi hisaab hi nahi hai ab. Raat ko jab bacha so jata hai toh lagta hai ki saansein atki hui hain, aur kab tak aise akele khinchti rahungi sab kuch. Job chali gayi hai aur main puri tarah exhausted hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Named the deep exhaustion hidden beneath her rigid duty of being a provider and mother.
text: Lagta hai ki is strong maa aur zimmedar beti ke role ko akele nibhate nibhate, tumhare andar ek bahut gehri thakaan aa chuki hai, jise darr aur duty ke dabao me tum ab tak ansuna kar rahi thi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe pathar ban kar khade rehna hoga
text: Sahi kaha... ansuna karna meri fitrat ban gayi hai. Par rone se rent toh nahi bharega na? Isliye saare aansu pee kar yahi sochti hoon ki mujhe pathar ban kar khade rehna hoga warna ghar kaise chalega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validated her exhaustion as culturally normal for single providers and disconnected her job loss from her worth.
text: Itni badi financial pareshani me akele rent aur gaon ki remittance ka bojh uthana kisi ko bhi exhausted aur helpless feel kara sakta hai, aur achanak aayi is job ki musibat ka tumhari mehnat ya lagan se koi lena-dena nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Lagan se hi toh kaam kar rahi thi. Din raat lapop par lagi rehti thi. Par ab lag raha hai maine apne papa ka karz chukane ka jo promise tha wo tod diya, aur bache ka bhavishya bhi daanv par laga diya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Shared an anecdote about single mothers facing structural guilt to normalize her feelings.
text: Akele apne bache ko paalne aur pichhe pariwar ko chalane wali working mothers me ye guilt aana bahut common hai—sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bahar iske bare me bolega nahi kyunki samaj hamesha ek perfect, sacrificing maa dekhna chahta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, sabne yahi tay kiya hua hai ki jo aurat ek bar society se lad gayi, usko kabhi thakne ya rone ka haq nahi hai. Maine khud se hi insaan hone ka haq chheen liya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflected how her relationship with her own needs became neglected due to her role expectations (Lens C).
text: Duniya ke samne ek himmat wali misaal banne ke chakkar me, tumhara apni khud ki zaruraton aur aaram se rishta poori tarah se disconnect ho gaya.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aaram ka toh naam bhi mat lo. Par sach me lag raha hai main is tarah aur zyada din tak bhag nahi paungi. Agle hafte rent ka time hai. Aap hi batao ab kya karoon, kaise balance karu sab kuch?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalized requesting a financial extension due to structural changes rather than personal failure.
text: Aise achanak job loss ya economic utaar-chadaav ke waqt, landlords aur society members ke paas temporary hardship period ko accommodate karne ki aam practices hoti hain, aur waqt maangna koi sharam ki baat nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Agar main waqt mangungi toh unhe shak hoga ki naukri nahi hai. Aur phir gaon walo tak baat pohanch jayegi. Main bina izzat kharab kiye landlord se kaise nipat sakti hoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offered small, actionable steps that fit her protective duty constraints.
text: Hum do chhote options soch sakte hain: ya toh landlord ko bas ek message kar de ki company processing delay ki wajah se rent thoda late aayega, ya phir abhi ke liye sirf gaon ka remittance ek hafte delay karke pehle rent nikal lein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Gaon ka paisa toh rokna hi padega thode din. Aur landlord wala idea theek lag raha hai ki company processing bol doon, usse ijjat bhi reh jayegi. Par darr lag raha hai message bhejte hue.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walked her through the small communication task step by step to reduce overwhelm.
text: Pehle landlord ka WhatsApp chat kholo... phir sirf itna type karo ki 'Namaste, is baar office processing me thoda delay hai, toh rent kuch din late transfer karungi'... uske baad send karke phone rakh dena, bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ha, ye likhna asaan hai aur isme main galat bhi nahi lagungi. Chalo main abhi likh ke side rakh dungi. Ek pareshani se toh thodi saans milegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflected her relief from taking control over the timeline of her stressor (Lens D).
text: Aage aane wale rent ke time ki tension ko lekar jo ghabrahat bani hui thi, ek message bhejte hi lag raha hai ki aane wale dino pe thoda control wapis aa gaya.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thoda toh wapis aaya. Jab apne bacche ka chehra dekhti hoon toh lagta hai in choti moti darr ko main aise hi messages se tackle kar lungi. Usko asar nahi aane dungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reassured her that she is already a capable mother even during this job loss.
text: Tumhare andar ki yeh maa jo har haal me apne bacche ke liye ek surakshit mahaul banati hai, wo bahut kaabil hai, aur ek company ka termination letter us haqeeqat ko nahi badal sakta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shukriya... dil halka lag raha hai ye sun kar. Lekin kal se mujhe job bhi toh dhoondhni hogi. Resumes wagerah ka kuch sochna padega, waqt bhi kam hai aur samajh nahi aa raha kahan se resume start karu.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provided small, accessible steps for starting the job search gently.
text: Job search ko asaan banane ke liye kal do options le sakte hain: ya toh roj bas 15 minute nikal kar job portal par resume update karein, ya apne do purane colleagues ko ek informal message bhej dein nayi opening ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Purane colleagues ko message karna theek lagega. Formal resume bananey me darr lagta hai. Kal LinkedIn par sirf do logo ko text kar dungi, itna hi goal theek hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflected how she is continuing her duties but through more manageable methods (Lens B).
text: Abhi bhi tumne apne kartavya aur apni mehnat se pichha nahi chudaya hai, balki is pahad jaise kaam ko chhote aur practical hisso me baant liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe pathar ban kar khade rehna hoga
text: Kartavya hi toh meri life hai. Mujhe mere bacche aur papa ko bachana hai, aage bhi unke liye mujhe pathar ban kar khade rehna hoga, par shayad ab main poori tarah se pathar nahi houngi, thodi saans bhi lungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Gave a systemic reframe on how self-preservation supports the broader family structure.
text: Aisa financial aapsi sahyog families me ek lamba safar hota hai, aur is safar me khud ke aaram aur saans lene ke liye thodi jagah banana darasal tumhari us long-term support ki neev ko aur majboot karta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh maine is tarah se kabhi socha hi nahi. Mujhe lagta tha khud pe ek minute bhi lagana swarth hai jabki unka karz baki hai. Par main theek houngi tabhi toh unhe paise bhej paungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Invited reflection on how this new perspective on her health impacts her view of the future.
text: Jab tum khud ki sehat aur thakan ko is lambi zimmedari ka ek zaroori hissa maan kar sochti ho, toh kal aane wali subah ab kahan tak alag lag rahi hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Aisa mehsoos ho raha hai ki subah uth ke mujhe bas jang nahi ladni hai, shayad main chaai peete waqt thoda sukoon bhi le sakti hoon bina kisi guilt ke.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflected the lessening of her fear of catastrophic consequences if she doesn't overwork (Lens E).
text: Shayad wo ek darr kam ho gaya hai jisme hamesha lagta tha ki thoda sa theharne ya saans lene par gaon me papa aur yahan baccha dono ka nuksaan ho jayega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul kam ho gaya. Aur is relief ka credit main aapko dungi. Aise akele itne bade bade darr dimaag me bohut shor machate hain, par baat karke saara dhuaa clear sa lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflected the relief from connecting relationally and not bearing it alone (Lens C).
text: Itne waqt se akele saare faisle lene aur dabao jhelne ke baad, aaj finally apne bojh ko baantne wali jagah milne se tumhe ek nayi roshni mehsoos hui hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, naye siray se lade ki umeed mil gayi. Ab main landlord ko message bhejungi aur bacche ko gale laga kar aram karungi. Kal ka kal dekhenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provided final reinforcement of her strength and resilience separate from the job.
text: Apne aur apne bacche ke liye aaj rukk kar araam karne ka ye faisla bahut mature hai, aur yaad rakhna, tumhara is mushkil waqt me bhi balance dhoondh lena tumhari asli kamyabi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera farz meri personal takleef se bohot bada hai
text: Subah email aaya aur ab sahukaar ka vyaj chukane ka darr dimaag mein ghar kar gaya hai, par main chup-chap naye interview dhoondne nikal gayi hoon. Single mother hone ki wajah se pehle hi society mein izzat bachana mushkil hai, ab is debt spiral mein phasi toh sab mazaak udayenge. Mujhe bas bina ruke endure karte rehna hai kyunki mera farz meri personal takleef se bohot bada hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the duty frame where her role as a provider overrides the shock of the email.
text: Aapne apni ghabrahat ko turant ek taraf rakh diya taaki aap bina ruke nayi naukri dhoondh sakein, kyunki aapke liye parivaar ko chalane ka farz kisi bhi aur cheez se zyada mayne rakhta hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera farz meri personal takleef se bohot bada hai
text: Karna hi padta hai. Agar main weak pad gayi toh mere bachhon ka kya hoga? Ye duniya pehle hi ek akele rehne wali aurat ko judge karne ke liye baithi rehti hai. Agar sahukaar ne ghar par aakar tamasha kiya toh izzat mitti mein mil jayegi. Isiliye rone ya thakne ka time nahi hai mere paas, bas bhagte rehna hai kyunki mera farz meri personal takleef se bohot bada hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the underlying fear of losing societal respect and facing judgment.
text: Yeh job jaane ka email dekhne ke baad aapko andar hi andar yeh darr khaa raha hai ki kahin sahukaar ki wajah se society mein jo aapne itni mehnat se samman banaya hai, us par aanch na aa jaye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur log toh bas mauka dhoondhte hain ungli uthane ka. Sab bolenge 'dekho, akele aayi thi shehar, fail ho gayi'. Ye judgement aur shame mujhe saans nahi lene de rahi, aur vyaj ka meter alag chal raha hai mere dimaag mein. Koi samajhne wala nahi hai meri is uljhan ko.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Responding to the stigma cue with a soft reflection of her relational isolation.
text: Akele is poore debt aur society ke taano ka bojh uthana aapko bohot zyada akela aur alag-thalag mehsoos karwa raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul akela. Mere parents ne toh pehle hi mujhse rishta tod diya tha jab maine akele bachhon ko paalne ka decision liya tha. Ab bachhon ki school fees aur is debt spiral ke beech main buri tarah pis rahi hoon. Subah se kuch khaya bhi nahi hai, bas resume drop kar rahi hoon alag alag office mein jakar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Probing how she locates herself within this non-stop pressure.
text: Jab aap is tarah se bina kuch khaye lagataar apna resume alag-alag jagah drop kar rahi hain, toh is gahri thakan aur society ki izzat bachane ke dabaav ke beech, aap apne aap ko kahan khada paati hain?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera farz meri personal takleef se bohot bada hai
text: Khada kahan paati hoon... main bas ek machine ban gayi hoon. Subah utho, kaam dhoondo, EMI aur vyaj do, aur bachhon ke samne jhoothi smile karo. Itni deep exhaustion hai ki kabhi kabhi saans rukne lagti hai darr se. Par phir wahi baat samne aati hai, mera farz meri personal takleef se bohot bada hai, toh machine ko chalna padta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the profound exhaustion born from the intersection of her duty and the financial crisis.
text: Lagta hai ki is na khatam hone wale chakkar mein sabki zarooratein poori karte karte aur society se ladte hue aapke andar ek bohot gehri exhaustion baith gayi hai, kyunki aapke paas khud ki saans lene ke liye koi jagah hi nahi bachi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Khud ke liye jagah chodi hi nahi maine. Mujhe darr lagta hai ki agar main ek din bhi ruk gayi aur sahukaar ghar aakar hungama karega, toh mere bachhon ko wo sab bura dekhna padega. Unki massomiyat bachani hai mujhe is gandi duniya se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her resilience and separating her worth as a mother from the systemic economic reality.
text: Bina kisi ke sahare akele apne bachhon ko sahukaar ki sachai aur society ke taanon se bacha kar rakhna aapki bohot badi resilience dikhata hai. Naukri chutne ka email aana us economy ki reality hai, isme as a single mother aapki mehnat ya neeyat ki koi kami nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye sunkar thoda halka toh lag raha hai par dil me darr wahi hai. Kabhi kabhi itna trapped feel hota hai is karz aur duties mein ki lagta hai kya main sach mein ek fail maa hoon jo bachhon ko safe life nahi de paa rahi? Is tension se raat bhar neend udh jati hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing the systemic pressure single mothers feel to fix everything alone, following a warm normalizing line for the mild risk.
text: Aapki neend udd jana aur is hadd tak ghabrana is waqt bilkul natural hai, aur aap bilkul bhi ek fail maa nahi hain. Single mothers mein yeh 'main akele hi sab theek kar doongi' wala dabaav aana bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki society unse hamesha perfect hone ki umeed karti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Perfect dikhne ke chakar mein hi toh meri ye halat hai. Ek 'strong independent woman' ka tag lag gaya hai, ab kisse madad mangu? Aur ye sahukaar ka vyaj toh bank loan jaisa bhi nahi hota, roz ka mental harassment hota hai isme. Ek call se saari himmat toot jati hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the prolonged duration of this specific stress.
text: Pichle kuch waqt se lagataar is 'strong' image ko society ke samne maintain karne aur har roz us sahukaar ki calls ke darr ke saath jeene ne aapko andar se poori tarah nichod diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bilkul nichod diya hai. Aur abhi ek aur interview ke liye jana hai mujhe adhe ghante mein. Mera dimaag blank ho raha hai ye soch ke ki agar ye interview bhi nahi hua toh kya hoga. Meri bachi-khuchi izzat khatam ho jayegi aur debt spiral mujhe nigal lega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Highlighting the feared consequence underlying her current panic about the interview.
text: Agale interview ko lekar jo darr aapko blank kar raha hai, uske peeche wahi gehri ghabrahat chupi hai ki wahan reject hone ka matlab debt aur society ki baaton ke aage puri tarah se haar jana hoga.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul wahi darr hai. Par is blank dimaag ke sath main HR ke samne baithungi toh guarantee reject ho jaungi. Mujhe theek se sochne ke liye kuch karna hi hoga. Aap batao main abhi kya karoon ki mera ye panic thoda control me aaye aur main perform kar saku?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing her blankness as a normal systemic response to financial distress rather than a personal failure.
text: Jab achanak se financial shock lagta hai aur theek agle hi pal humein perform karna padta hai, toh dimaag ka blank hona ek bahut hi normal structural reaction hai aisi badhti uncertainty ke khilaf, yeh panic aapki koi personal kamzori nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Samajh rahi hoon ki ye normal reaction hai, par reality toh ye hai ki mujhe wo job crack karni hi padegi apne bachhon ke liye. Mujhe koi practical tareeka bataiye jisse main is lobby mein baithe baithe khud ko shant aur grounded feel kar saku.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering practical, discreet grounding exercises that fit her immediate environment.
text: Abhi interview lobby mein rehte hue hum do choti cheezein try kar sakte hain. Ya toh aap wahi kursi par baith kar apne dono pairon ko zameen par zorse press karein auraas-paas ki 3 alag awaazon par dhyan dein, ya apne bachhon ki koi aisi photo dekh lein jo aapko yaad dilaye ki aap kitni door aa chuki hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bachhon ki photo dekh kar shayad rona aa jayega aur main emotional nahi hona chahti abhi. Pairon ko zameen par press karne wala tareeka theek lag raha hai mujhe. Ye main bina kisi ko pata chale kar sakti hoon yahan lobby mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walking her step-by-step through the chosen grounding exercise.
text: Pehle yeh karo ki apne dono pairon ko zameen par theek se flat rakh do… phir dreere dreere unka dabav zameen par mehsoos karo aur do gehri saans lo… bas itna hi aaj ke liye, apna poora dhyan sirf us touch par tika kar rakho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kar rahi hoon... haan, pair zameen par tikane se thoda farak mehsoos ho raha hai. Dimaag jo debt aur izzat ke khayalon mein uljha tha, wo thoda present moment mein aaya hai. Saans lene mein bhi ab utni rukaawat nahi lag rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the shift from her prolonged morning panic to this moment of stillness.
text: Subah email aane ke baad se jo dimaag lagataar dar ke maare bhag raha tha, usne aakhir is ek pal mein aakar thoda thehraav aur stability mehsoos ki hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera farz meri personal takleef se bohot bada hai
text: Yeh thehraav bohot zaruri tha mere liye. Main humesha dusron ke liye bhagte rehti hoon. Par ab realise ho raha hai ki agar main internally shant nahi rahungi, toh interview me confidence kaise dikhaungi. Mera farz meri personal takleef se bohot bada hai, isiliye khud ko theek rakhna bhi us farz ka hissa hi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her shifting duty framework where self-regulation is now seen as part of her provision.
text: Khud ki is ghabrahat ko shant karne ke kadam ko aapne ek rukawat ki tarah nahi, balki apne bachhon ke prati apna farz nibhane ke sabse zaroori aur practical hisse ke roop mein dekhna shuru kar diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, thoda perspective change ho raha hai ab. Main is interview ko apne bachaav ke aakhiri raaste ki tarah nahi dekhna chahti, balki mere paas jo skills hain unko professionally present karne jaungi. Agar ye interview nahi hua toh kal doosri jagah try kar lungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her clear mindset despite the intense societal and financial pressures.
text: Aapki is tayari aur is mushkil waqt mein apna approach badalne ki shamta sach mein kabile tareef hai. Ek single mother hone ke naate society aur karz ka jo bhari pressure aap jhel rahi hain, uske bawajood apne skills par itna clear vishwas rakhna aapki asal takat hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you so much. Ye shame jo subah se mujhe block kar rahi thi, wo ab kafi hadd tak kam ho gayi hai. Vyaj aur sahukaar ki problem abhi solve nahi hui hai, par mujhe lagta hai main ab us tension se behtar deal kar sakti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledging the lingering fear of the moneylender while highlighting her restored agency.
text: Sahukaar ka tension abhi bhi apni jagah par barkarar hai, par uske darr ko aapne itna halka kar liya hai ki ab aap usse darkar bhagne ki bajay uska samna karne ke liye tayyar lag rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi pakda aapne. Tension toh raat tak rahegi jab tak job ka kuch solid confirm nahi hota. Par tab tak main ye pressure handle kar sakti hoon. Abhi receptionist ne mera naam bulaya hai interview ke liye. Main andar jane ke liye ready hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing endurance to include moments of pause, offering a long-term takeaway for her debt situation.
text: Aksar hum aisi situations mein yeh bhool jate hain ki structural pressures se bachne ke liye endurance ka matlab sirf lagataar bhagte rehna nahi hota, balki aise thehraav lena bhi us ladaai ka zaruri hissa hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bahut khoobsoorat baat kahi aapne. Main is thehraav ko yaad rakhungi. Pehli baar bina kisi judgement ke kisi ne meri uljhan suni hai. Mujhe 'strong single mother' ki acting nahi karni padi aaj.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the relational safety she experienced during the chat.
text: Aaj ki is baatcheet mein aapko woh samaj ki chuppi aur akelapan mehsoos nahi hua, jahan aapko kisi ko impress karne ke liye ek perfect maa ka mukhauta pehnna padta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Woh mukhauta utaar kar do minute thik se saans lena mere liye life-saving jaisa tha aaj. Main ab cabin ke andar ja rahi hoon. Wish me luck for this new beginning!

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Highlighting the transformation in her temporal outlook—from morning panic to present confidence.
text: Thodi der pehle jo pal ekdum ghabrahat aur pressure se bhara lag raha tha, ab darr hatne ke baad wahi pal ek nayi shuruaat aur atma-vishwas mein badal gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji, ekdum wahi mehsoos ho raha hai. Apna khayal rakhiyega aur is sahi waqt par support dene ke liye bahut bahut shukriya. Chalti hoon main, aage ka rasta ab clear hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ending with warm, culturally competent encouragement for her interview and journey.
text: Aap poore honsle aur clarity ke sath andar jaakar apni skills dikhane ke liye tayyar hain. Aapke is interview aur aage ke behtar safar ke liye bohot saari shubhkamnayein, apna dhyan rakhiyega.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe bas apne parivaar ki shaan bachane ke liye bina thake ladte rehna hai
text: Mere paas rone ke liye ek pal bhi nahi hai, mujhe bas apne parivaar ki shaan bachane ke liye bina thake ladte rehna hai. Job chali gayi hai par main laptop band nahi kar sakti kyunki bank ki EMI default ka khatra hai aur bacchon ka future mujh par tika hai. Thakan itni hai ki aankhein band ho rahi hain, par structural endurance hi meri reality hai kyunki main hi ghar ki head hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the duty frame to validate her commitment to her children despite extreme exhaustion.
text: Aapke upar poore ghar ki aur bacchon ke future ki itni badi responsibility hai, ki aisi gehri thakan aur job loss ke bawajood aap ek family head ke roop mein apni duty poori kar rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe bas apne parivaar ki shaan bachane ke liye bina thake ladte rehna hai
text: Rukungi toh sab bikhar jayega na. Main single mother hoon, mera koi backup nahi hai. Mujhe bas apne parivaar ki shaan bachane ke liye bina thake ladte rehna hai. Agar EMI default ho gayi, toh bacchon ke school aur society mein kya munh dikhaungi?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the feared consequence regarding societal judgment and losing face.
text: Agar loan ki kisht chook gayi, toh bahar bacchon ke school aur logon ke aage jo shaan aapne banayi hai us par kya asar padega, is baat ka darr aapko andar hi andar sata raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe bas apne parivaar ki shaan bachane ke liye bina thake ladte rehna hai
text: Exactly. Sab mere akele ke kandhon par hai. Raat-raat bhar laptop khol kar job portals dekhti hoon. Meri aukaat nahi hai thakne ki, mujhe bas apne parivaar ki shaan bachane ke liye bina thake ladte rehna hai. Main kisi ko bata bhi nahi sakti apni job ke baare mein, log single mothers par vaise hi itni pity karte hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relational burden of hiding her situation to avoid societal pity, keeping it brief due to stigma cue.
text: Logon ki us pity aur taanon se bachne ke liye, aap yeh sab akele hi handle karne ki koshish kar rahi hain...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, akele hi jhelna padega. Bachon ko bhi lagta hai mummy roz ki tarah WFH kar rahi hai. Unke saamne muskurana padta hai. Par pichle ek hafte se dimaag mein har waqt sirf numbers chalte rehte hain - EMI, rent, fees. Aisa lagta hai saans lene ki jagah hi nahi bachi hai meri life mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the duration and exhaustion of putting on a brave face continuously for a week.
text: Pichle ek hafte se lagaatar unke saamne muskurane ki acting karna aur akele finances ki ghabrahat uthana, is double life ne aapko bilkul nichod diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bahut zyada nichod diya hai. Duniya ko lagta hai main bahut strong and independent hoon. Par sach kahun toh is strong family head ki image maintain karne ki keemat bahut mehengi pad rahi hai mujhe aaj kal.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking a question to explore the contrast between her strong image and her internal emotional state.
text: Is duniya ke saamne strong dikhne wale role ke bilkul peechhe, jab aap akele baithi hoti hain toh andar se aap actual mein kaisa mehsoos kar rahi hoti hain?

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul thaki hui. Din bhar mask lagane ke baad, sach kahun toh lagta hai main physically aur mentally khatam ho chuki hoon. Par main break nahi le sakti. Mere bacche mere bina kya karenge? Mera andar se tootna unke liye disaster hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the deep hidden feeling of exhaustion beneath her duty-bound life.
text: Lagta hai itne waqt se akele sab kuch perfect rakhne ki koshish mein aap ek aisi gehri thakan aur exhaustion mehsoos kar rahi hain, jise bacchon ki wajah se aap kisi ko dikha nahi paati.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe bas apne parivaar ki shaan bachane ke liye bina thake ladte rehna hai
text: Dikha kar karna bhi kya hai? Mujhe bas apne parivaar ki shaan bachane ke liye bina thake ladte rehna hai. Agar main weak pad gayi, toh single mother hone ka stigma mujhe aur mere bacchon ko kha jayega. Is precarity mein aur koi rasta nahi hai mere paas.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her exhaustion as normal for a single parent and separating her self-worth from the corporate reality.
text: Ek akele parent ke roop mein economy ki is uncertainty mein bacchon ki har zarurat poori karte hue aisi thakan aur darr mehsoos karna bilkul natural hai; yeh job jana corporate setup ka hissa hai, iska aapke ache parent hone se koi lena-dena nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Corporate reality toh hai, par direct hit meri family par aayega na. Agle mahine se warning letters aana shuru ho jayenge agar EMI gayi nahi. Us guilt ke chakkar mein neend udh gayi hai ki main unko ek secure future deny kar rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing the hidden guilt single mothers feel due to systemic expectations.
text: Working mothers mein yeh guilt bahut common hai ki chahe woh jitna bhi try karein, kuch na kuch chhoot raha hai — sirf aap akeli is se nahi guzar rahi hain, lekin koi bolta nahi kyunki society ideal mother se sab kuch perfectly handle karne ki umeed rakhti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapne theek kaha, ideal banne ke chakkar mein sach mein jaan jaati hai. Main poori raat apply karti rehti hoon, par ab samajh nahi aa raha aage kaise manage hoga jab savings bhi kam hain. Kuch raasta nikalna padega mujhe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing low-effort options to handle the immediate panic without asking her to compromise duties.
text: Aage ka raasta thoda aasaan aur clear karne ke liye hum do chhote steps le sakte hain jo jyada waqt nahi lenge. Ya toh hum apne bank ke portal par EMI moratorium ke baare mein check kar sakte hain, ya phir sirf is mahine ke sabse zaroori kharchon ko ek chhoti list mein likh sakte hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bank portal check karna theek rahega. List banane se abhi aur zyada tension badhegi. Moratorium ka word maine suna tha, par kabhi dhyan dene ki zaroorat nahi padi thi. EMI defer karne ka soch kar thodi bechaini hoti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Guiding her through the bank portal check step by step to build a sense of control.
text: Pehle aap apne phone ya laptop par bank ka page open kijiye... phir wahan search bar mein 'EMI grace period' ya 'hardship assistance' type karke options dekh lijiye... bas itna hi aaj ke liye, hume abhi sirf information leni hai, apply nahi karna.

speaker: Seeker
text: Maine check kiya. Wahan ek hardship form diya hua hai jisko bharkar kuch mahine ki grace mil sakti hai. Ye thoda comforting hai ki at least directly default mark hone se bach sakta hai ek baar baat karke.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her relief at finding a way to mitigate the feared consequence of default.
text: Bank ka yeh hardship option dekh kar aapko thodi tasalli mili hai ki abhi jo defaulter banne ka sabse bada darr tha, usko handle karne ka ek practical alternative maujood hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, but isse income thodi aayegi wapas. EMIs defer hongi, par bacchon ke roz ke kharche toh nahi rukenge. Mera wapas dimaag isi baat par focus karne lagta hai ki naya source kab aayega kyunki uske bina ghar nahi chalega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using systemic framing to normalize the pressure of lost income for a primary earner.
text: Aisi achanak aayi economic precarity ke dauran, jab job achanak chali jaye, toh har family head ka dimaag survival aur immediate income par hi focus karta hai; yeh aapka default problem-solving mode hai aur poori tarah se valid hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Problem solving toh karni padegi. Main soch rahi hoon apni purani company ke colleagues ko message kar doon. Unhe mera track record pata hai. Par andar se ajeeb si jhijhak aur sharam lagti hai madad maangne mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relational conflict between needing help and the pride of an independent woman.
text: Aap un colleagues se aage network karna chahti hain, par dusri taraf aapko lagta hai ki is mushkil waqt mein support maangne se shayad aapki independent image par aanch aayegi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe bas apne parivaar ki shaan bachane ke liye bina thake ladte rehna hai
text: Image se ration nahi aata na. Mujhe bas apne parivaar ki shaan bachane ke liye bina thake ladte rehna hai. Sharam aur hesitation toh mujhe side mein rakhna hi padega. Mere bacchon ka future zyada bada hai meri akele ki image se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the duty mechanism where she actively sacrifices her personal pride for her children's safety.
text: Bacchon ki zarooraton ko sabse uncha darja dekar, aap apne ego aur us sharam dono ko cross karne ke liye ab mazbooti se taiyaar hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Taiyaar toh hoon. Main aaj raat hi kuch messages draft karke rakh lungi LinkedIn par. Subah bhejne mein aasaani hogi. Layoff ki jagah main bolungi I'm looking out for new roles due to restructuring. Woh theek rahega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her proactive time orientation for tomorrow morning.
text: Purane connections jinhe aapke kaam par bharosa hai, unhe bina poori situation bataye smartly message draft karke aap apne kal ke din ki shuruaat secure karna chahti hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Kam se kam ye karne ke baad mujhe raat ko thodi bahut neend toh aayegi. Aisa lagega ki maine system ke against kuch steps toh liye apne bacchon ke future ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking how she feels internally after planning these small steps.
text: Jab aap yeh chhote steps likh kar aur messages draft karke kal ke liye tyaar rakhti hain, toh akele poora load uthane ka woh bojh abhi is waqt kaisa lagta hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Abhi thoda halka lag raha hai actually. Pehle lag raha tha ki main as a head fail ho rahi hoon, par ab lagta hai failure nahi, sirf ek mushkil daur hai. Main lad lungi. Mujhe apne bacchon ki taraf dekhna hai bas.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her self-correction and reaffirming her capability as a leader of the house.
text: Aapka wapas apne control mein aana aur har mushkil ko samne se face karna yeh saabit karta hai ki aap ek behad capable head hain jo kisi bhi mushkil daur se nikalne ki poori taqat rakhti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you mere darr ko bina judge kiye sunne ke liye. Yeh jo constant 'structural endurance' hai, akele karne mein bohut darr lagta hai kabhi kabhi. Par abhi I feel much grounded.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her insight about the fear and loneliness of being the sole anchor for the family.
text: Aapko ehsaas ho gaya hai ki har waqt bina rukaawat akele aage badhne ka yeh dabaav hi tha jo fail hone ke darr ko aur bada bana raha tha.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi baat hai. Dabaav hata nahi hai, par ab darr thoda manage ho gaya hai. Main kal subah uth kar apne routine ke hisaab se sab sambhal lungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her commitment to returning to her routine and relationships calmly.
text: Bacchon ki daily shanti aur ghar ka normal mahaul barkaraar rakhne ke liye, aapne kal ke purane routine mein nayi himmat ke saath jaane ka faisla kiya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe bas apne parivaar ki shaan bachane ke liye bina thake ladte rehna hai
text: Yes, absolutely. Ab main apna laptop thodi der ke liye band karungi aur bacchon ko dekhungi. Mujhe bas apne parivaar ki shaan bachane ke liye bina thake ladte rehna hai, aur rone ka waqt main kisi aur din nikal lungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her duty-based resolve as a concluding thought of empowerment.
text: Apne parivaar aur unke safe future ki zimmedari ko poori nishtha se apna kar, aapne is waqt thodi der aaram karne ko apni nayi aur sabse badi taqat bana liya hai.
